title: client PoW difficulty cap (60) exceeds server max (30), enabling DoS
description: transport.rs:388 checks diff <= 60 but DESIGN.md and pow.rs MAX_DIFFICULTY=30 cap the server at 30. A malicious relay advertising diff=31..60 causes the client to mine in spawn_blocking for astronomically long periods, hanging the auth handshake. The client guard should check diff > pow::MAX_DIFFICULTY, not diff > 60.
